    • getInstance

      public static Acquisition getInstance()
      Gets the instance of Acquisition. Instantiates Acquisition if null.

    • setPivot

      public void setPivot(AcquisitionConstants.AcquisitionSetpoint setpoint)
      Sets the pivot motor position.
      Parameters:
      setpoint - The setpoint for the pivot motor to go to.

    • setPivotDegrees

      public void setPivotDegrees(double degrees)

    • acquire

      public void acquire()
      Sets the Acquisition's intake power to AcquisitionConstants.INTAKE_ACQUIRE_DUTY_CYCLE.

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Sets the Acquisition's disposal power to AcquisitionConstants.INTAKE_DISPOSE_DUTY_CYCLE.

    • stopIntake

      public void stopIntake()
      Stops the intake motor.

    • stopPivot

      public void stopPivot()

      Gets if the pivot motor is at the setpoint.
